variants._comment:: ($self$) 申请成为朋友 口上文。分为关系好版本和关系没那么好版本，之后差分
($self$) 拒绝成为朋友 口上文
($self$) 被拒绝成为朋友 口上文
($self$) 朋友关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_1: $self$犹豫了一下，从口袋里拿出一块有些融化的糖果递过去。"那个……这个给你。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_2: $self$看着$target$，似乎想说什么，最后只是指了指旁边的空位。"如果不介意的话，要坐这里吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_3: $self$在路过时稍微放慢了脚步，简短地打了个招呼。"我们要去同一个方向吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_4: $self$并没有直视$target$，只是将手中的资料多复印了一份放在桌角。"顺手多弄了一份。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_5: $self$显得有些局促，清了清嗓子。"那个……关于刚才的话题，我想听听你的看法。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_6: $self$停下手中的动作，用余光瞥向$target$。"以后……可以直接叫你的名字吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_7: $self$笑着凑近，甚至能感觉到呼吸扑面而来。"喂，我们也算是共犯了吧？以后多多关照啦，朋友！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_8: $self$大大方方地把手搭在$target$的肩膀上拍了拍。"既然这么合拍，那我们就正式结盟吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_9: $self$从包里掏出两罐饮料，单手拉开一罐递过去。"干杯！为了我们的友谊！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_10: $self$直接抓起$target$的手晃了晃，笑得眉眼弯弯。"那说好了，以后我们就是一伙的！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_11: $self$做了一个夸张的敬礼动作。"以后请多指教啦，好搭档！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_propose_12: $self$兴奋地拿手肘顶了顶$target$的腰。"以后有好事可别忘了叫上我这个朋友哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_1: $self$紧绷的肩膀明显放松下来，嘴角露出一个极浅的弧度。"好吧，听你的。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_2: $self$点了点头，虽然没有说话，但眼神中的戒备消散了不少。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_3: $self$默默地将自己的物品往旁边挪了挪，特意留出了更多的空间。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_4: $self$接过了$target$递来的东西，指尖短暂接触并未避开。"谢谢你。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_5: $self$低头看着地面，声音很轻。"那就……麻烦你了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_6: $self$稍微调整了站姿，不再是防御性的姿态，而是微微侧身面向$target$。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_7: $self$开心地击了一下掌，声音清脆。"太棒了！我就知道你会答应！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_8: $self$直接揽住了$target$的脖子，仿佛认识了多年的老友。"走走走，为了庆祝我们的友谊，去吃顿好的！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_9: $self$从口袋里掏出手机，快速点开二维码。"快快快，加个好友，以后随时联系！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_10: $self$笑得前仰后合，伸手揉了揉$target$的头发。"以后你就是我的人了，谁欺负你报我名字！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_11: $self$兴奋地在原地转了个圈。"这是我今天听到的最好的消息！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_set_12: $self$向$target$比了一个大大的拇指，眼神亮晶晶的。"我就知道我们合得来！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_1: $self$礼貌性地后退了半步，保持着安全的社交距离。"抱歉，我不太习惯和人走得太近。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_2: $self$没有接过伸来的手，只是微微鞠了一躬。"我们现在这样保持工作关系就挺好的。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_3: $self$看了一眼手机，仿佛突然想起了什么急事。"不好意思，我还有点事，先失陪了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_4: $self$脸上的笑容淡去，语气变得公事公办。"我不觉得这是个好主意。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_5: $self$将双手插在口袋里，视线越过$target$看向远方。"我不擅长交朋友，还是算了吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_6: $self$轻轻摇了摇头，没有过多的解释，转身离开。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_7: $self$夸张地摆了摆手，脸上带着戏谑的笑。"哇，别这么肉麻好不好？我鸡皮疙瘩都起来了！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_8: $self$用手指轻轻弹了一下$target$的额头。"想做我的朋友？那还得再修炼一百年呢！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_9: $self$哈哈大笑起来，仿佛听到了什么笑话。"别闹了，我们这样互损不是更有趣吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_10: $self$假装没听见，吹着口哨看向别处。"啊？风太大听不清——"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_11: $self$俏皮地眨了眨眼，做了一个鬼脸。"才不要呢，做朋友多无聊啊。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refuse_12: $self$双手交叉在胸前比了一个‘X’。"驳回驳回！现在的距离感刚刚好！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_1: $self$伸在半空中的手僵硬了一下，随后尴尬地收回挠了挠头。"啊……也是，是我唐突了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_2: $self$眼中的光芒黯淡下来，低头看着自己的脚尖。"抱歉，打扰你了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_3: $self$抿了抿嘴唇，强撑着维持表面的平静。"没关系，我理解。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_4: $self$迅速地收拾好心情，恢复了平日的冷淡表情。"忘掉我刚才说的话吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_5: $self$有些不知所措地摩挲着衣角。"那……就当我没说。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_6: $self$甚至不敢看$target$的眼睛，匆忙转身想要逃离这个尴尬的氛围。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_7: $self$脸上的笑容僵了一瞬，随即用更大的笑声掩盖过去。"开玩笑的啦！看把你吓的！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_8: $self$故作轻松地耸了耸肩。"切，不当就不当，稀罕吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_9: $self$别过头去，声音有些发闷。"真无情啊……不过算了，本小姐也不缺朋友。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_10: $self$用力拍了一下$target$的背。"这么严肃干嘛？拒绝就拒绝呗，我又不会吃了你。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_11: $self$虽然嘴上说着‘没事’，但眼神明显在躲闪。"好啦好啦，翻篇翻篇！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_refused_12: $self$深吸了一口气，努力让声音听起来正常。"没关系，反正来日方长嘛。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_1: $self$面无表情地将借来的书放在桌上，发出‘啪’的一声轻响。"还给你，以后别来找我了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_2: $self$在走廊相遇时直接把头扭向一边，仿佛旁边是一团空气。"……"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_3: $self$冷冷地注视着$target$，眼神里没有一丝温度。"我们之间没什么好说的了。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_4: $self$删除了通讯记录，将手机屏幕熄灭。"到此为止吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_5: $self$平静地收拾着自己的东西，将原本混在一起的物品分得清清楚楚。"这些是你的，拿走。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_6: $self$侧身让开道路，动作中充满了拒绝交流的意味。
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_7: $self$红着眼眶，死死地盯着$target$，胸口剧烈起伏。"我真是看错你了……滚！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_8: $self$抓起手边的东西狠狠摔在地上，碎片四溅。"别叫我的名字！你不配！"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_9: $self$原本想要争辩什么，但在对视的一瞬间突然泄了气，露出一抹苦笑。"算了……真的没意思。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_10: $self$用力地擦过$target$的肩膀走过去，甚至撞得对方一个趔趄。"别挡路。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_11: $self$声音颤抖着，指着门口的方向。"趁我还没发火之前，消失在我面前。"
zh-cn.relationship_friend_break_12: $self$看着曾经的合照，沉默许久后将其撕成了两半扔进垃圾桶。"再见。"

en-us.relationship_friend_propose_1: $self$ hesitated, then took out a slightly melted candy from her pocket. "Here... this is for you."
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_2: $self$ looked at $target$, seeming to want to say something, but finally just pointed to the empty seat nearby. "If you don't mind... would you like to sit here?"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_3: $self$ slowed down slightly while passing by, offering a brief greeting. "Are we heading in the same direction?"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_4: $self$ didn't look directly at $target$, simply placing an extra copy of the document on the corner of the table. "Just happened to make an extra one."
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_5: $self$ seemed a bit awkward, clearing her throat. "Um... about that topic just now, I'd like to hear your thoughts."
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_6: $self$ paused her work, glancing at $target$ from the corner of her eye. "Can I... call you by your name from now on?"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_7: $self$ smiled and leaned in close, her breath almost palpable. "Hey, we're partners in crime now, right? Let's get along, friend!"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_8: $self$ boldly placed her hand on $target$'s shoulder and patted it. "Since we hit it off so well, let's make this alliance official!"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_9: $self$ pulled two cans of soda from her bag, popped one open, and handed it over. "Cheers! To our friendship!"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_10: $self$ grabbed $target$'s hand and shook it, eyes curving with a smile. "It's a deal then! We're on the same team from now on!"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_11: $self$ gave an exaggerated salute. "Looking forward to working with you, partner!"
en-us.relationship_friend_propose_12: $self$ excitedly nudged $target$'s waist with her elbow. "Don't forget to include your friend when something good happens!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_1: $self$'s tense shoulders visibly relaxed, and a faint smile appeared on her lips. "Alright, I'll listen to you."
en-us.relationship_friend_set_2: $self$ nodded. Though she didn't speak, the wariness in her eyes dissipated significantly.
en-us.relationship_friend_set_3: $self$ silently moved her belongings aside, deliberately leaving more space.
en-us.relationship_friend_set_4: $self$ took the item $target$ handed over, her fingertips briefly touching yours without pulling away. "Thank you."
en-us.relationship_friend_set_5: $self$ looked down at the ground, her voice very soft. "Then... I'll trouble you with that."
en-us.relationship_friend_set_6: $self$ adjusted her stance slightly, no longer defensive, but turning sideways to face $target$.
en-us.relationship_friend_set_7: $self$ clapped her hands happily, the sound crisp. "Awesome! I knew you'd agree!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_8: $self$ threw her arm around $target$'s neck as if they were old friends. "Let's go, let's go! To celebrate our friendship, let's get some good food!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_9: $self$ pulled out her phone and quickly opened a QR code. "Hurry, hurry! Add me so we can stay in touch!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_10: $self$ laughed heartily, reaching out to ruffle $target$'s hair. "You're mine now! If anyone bullies you, just drop my name!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_11: $self$ spun around excitedly on the spot. "That's the best news I've heard all day!"
en-us.relationship_friend_set_12: $self$ gave $target$ a big thumbs up, her eyes sparkling. "I knew we'd get along!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_1: $self$ politely took half a step back, maintaining a safe social distance. "Sorry, I'm not used to getting too close to people."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_2: $self$ didn't take the offered hand, just bowing slightly. "I think it's better if we keep things professional."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_3: $self$ checked her phone as if suddenly remembering something urgent. "Sorry, I have something to do. Excuse me."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_4: $self$'s smile faded, her tone becoming businesslike. "I don't think that's a good idea."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_5: $self$ put her hands in her pockets, looking past $target$ into the distance. "I'm not good at making friends, so let's just forget it."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_6: $self$ shook her head gently and turned to leave without further explanation.
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_7: $self$ waved her hand dismissively, a teasing smile on her face. "Whoa, don't be so cheesy! You're giving me goosebumps!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_8: $self$ lightly flicked $target$'s forehead with a finger. "Want to be my friend? You'll need another hundred years of training for that!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_9: $self$ burst out laughing as if she'd heard a joke. "Come on, isn't it more fun for us to just roast each other?"
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_10: $self$ pretended not to hear, whistling and looking away. "Huh? The wind's too loud, I can't hear you—"
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_11: $self$ winked playfully and made a face. "No way, being friends is so boring."
en-us.relationship_friend_refuse_12: $self$ crossed her arms in an 'X' shape. "Rejected! The current distance between us is just right!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_1: $self$'s hand froze in mid-air, then she awkwardly pulled it back to scratch her head. "Ah... right, I was being presumptuous."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_2: $self$'s eyes dimmed as she looked down at her toes. "Sorry to bother you."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_3: $self$ pursed her lips, struggling to maintain a calm facade. "It's okay, I understand."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_4: $self$ quickly composed herself, returning to her usual cool expression. "Just forget what I said."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_5: $self$ rubbed the hem of her clothes, looking somewhat lost. "Then... pretend I didn't say anything."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_6: $self$ didn't even dare to look $target$ in the eye, turning hurriedly to escape the awkward atmosphere.
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_7: $self$'s smile froze for a split second, then she covered it up with loud laughter. "Just kidding! Look how scared you got!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_8: $self$ shrugged, feigning nonchalance. "Tch, whatever. Who cares?"
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_9: $self$ turned her head away, her voice muffled. "So heartless... but whatever, I'm not lacking in friends anyway."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_10: $self$ slapped $target$'s back hard. "Why so serious? A rejection is just a rejection, I'm not gonna eat you."
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_11: $self$ said 'it's fine,' but her eyes were clearly avoiding contact. "Okay, okay! moving on!"
en-us.relationship_friend_refused_12: $self$ took a deep breath, trying to make her voice sound normal. "It's fine, there's always plenty of time in the future."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_1: $self$ expressionlessly placed the borrowed book on the table with a soft 'thud'. "Returning this. Don't come looking for me again."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_2: $self$ turned her head away when passing in the hallway, as if there was nothing but air beside her. "..."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_3: $self$ stared coldly at $target$, her eyes devoid of warmth. "We have nothing left to say to each other."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_4: $self$ deleted the chat history and turned off her phone screen. "Let's end this here."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_5: $self$ calmly packed her things, separating the mixed items clearly. "These are yours. Take them."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_6: $self$ stepped aside, her movements full of refusal to communicate.
en-us.relationship_friend_break_7: $self$, with red-rimmed eyes, stared intensely at $target$, her chest heaving. "I was so wrong about you... Get out!"
en-us.relationship_friend_break_8: $self$ grabbed something nearby and smashed it on the floor, fragments flying. "Don't say my name! You don't deserve to!"
en-us.relationship_friend_break_9: $self$ wanted to argue, but the moment their eyes met, she deflated, revealing a bitter smile. "Forget it... this is meaningless."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_10: $self$ brushed past $target$ forcefully, nearly making you stumble. "Out of my way."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_11: $self$ pointed towards the door, her voice trembling. "Disappear from my sight before I lose my temper."
en-us.relationship_friend_break_12: $self$ looked at an old photo of the two of you, then tore it in half and threw it in the trash after a long silence. "Goodbye."
